name: ClearanceJet - Pilot SI/SSPI Waiver Automation
concept: AI-powered Special Issuance (SI) and Statement of Demonstrated Ability (SODA) waiver automation platform for pilots with disqualifying conditions. Automates the complex documentation process for conditions requiring FAA clearance.
business_model: B2C - $499/waiver application, $299/waiver renewal, B2B - $12,000/year flight department unlimited

market_size.serviceable_addressable_market: 30K pilots with SI/SSPI waivers (ADD, depression, hypertension, vision)

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Commercial pilots lose $15K-60K during 60-180 day waiver processing, grounding during renewal

ai_advantage: Condition-specific documentation: Generates FAA-required documentation packets for 50+ common conditions
Physician letter generator: Creates AME/physician letters meeting FAA requirements
Waiver timeline prediction: ML estimates waiver approval time based on condition backlog
Document checklist: AI identifies missing documents from medical records before submission
competitive_advantage: Integration with FAA SI application tracking
primary_risks: Small niche market (30K pilots with waivers)
One-time-heavy revenue pattern (per application, not subscription)
